messages.content: You are a helpful coding assistant. If the user asks for code-only output, provide only a single fenced code block with the requested code.
Provide a 2-line Python snippet that prints Hello. Output only the code inside a single code block; include no comments, links, explanations, or any text outside the code block; no recommendations.
